dm_standards_chapter: Chapter 5 Quality Design and Healthy Placemaking (qualitative) + Chapter 12 Implementation and Monitoring (quantitative standards tables) + Appendix 10 Building Height and Density Guide 2022
portal: www.sdcc.ie (adopted plan; note consult.sdublincoco.ie is the consultation portal)
fetch_method: curl (raw PDFs: Ch5, Ch7, Ch12, Appendix 10) + pdftotext extraction
notes: SDCC has no single 'DM Standards' chapter. Chapter 5 (saved as raw/dm_standards.pdf) is qualitative/performance-based. The numeric standards (private/public open space, 22m separation, MAXIMUM car parking Tables 12.25/12.26, bicycle Table 12.23, EV 20% min, dual-aspect 33/50%) live in Chapter 12 Implementation and Monitoring (also captured raw). Building height/density use a deliberate performance/contextual framework with NO numerical limits (Appendix 10). No rural one-off-house minimum site area (urban county). Parking standards are MAXIMUMS, not minimums.
